title: Orchard Toys Countdown to Christmas Activity Book
features: CHRISTMAS IS COMING: Our festive Countdown to Christmas advent activity book is packed full of pictures to colour in, counting exercises, and fun creative challenges. Help build excitement for the big day with this alternative to an advent calendar.
FESTIVE ACTIVITIES FOR KIDS: Each daily activity sheet includes age-appropriate pictures of familiar Christmas characters, plus exciting step-by-step activities to reinforce early learning skills.

EDUCATIONAL BENEFITS: Designed with education in mind, our Christmas colouring books for kids help to improve hand-eye coordination and colour recognition and promote language and literacy skills as well as being super fun!
SUSTAINABLE: Manufactured to exceptionally high standards, our xmas colouring books for kids are crafted from recycled paper from sustainable sources.

CONTENTS: Each Christmas activity book includes 25 pages of festive activities to complete each day in the run up to the 25th of December. It also includes matching stickers, a pullout advent scene, and a letter to Santa with a personalised response!

ORCHARD TOYS ACTIVITY BOOKS: With 11 exciting themed activity books to choose from, including farmyard animals, outer space, dinosaurs, and counting, children have endless opportunities to learn through play.

ORCHARD TOYS: We've been making educational games and puzzles for over 50 years. Trusted by parents, schools, and childcare settings, our high quality products will stand the test of time for generations to come.
description: From the manufacturer Keep children entertained and engaged over the festive season with Orchard Toys Countdown to Christmas Activity Book! Have lots of fun completing 25 festive activities from colouring in Freezy the snowman to helping Rudolph find his way through the maze to his dinner. Plus, featuring other colouring pages, wordsearches, activities and Christmas recipes! With a sticker to add to every page, this activity book is a perfect advent gift that can be enjoyed throughout the festive period. Countdown to Christmas Activity Book is an ideal alternative to the traditional advent calendar, and comes with stickers to add to an enchanting Christmas wonderland advent scene, that can be pulled out and displayed at home. HOW TO USE Count the days to Christmas with this bumper activity book! Have lots of fun completing 25 festive activities from colouring in Freezy the snowman to helping Rudolph find his way through the maze to his dinner. Plus, featuring other colouring pages, wordsearches, activities and Christmas recipes! With a sticker to add to every page, this activity book is a perfect advent gift that can be enjoyed throughout the festive period. Countdown to Christmas Activity Book is an ideal alternative to the traditional advent calendar, and comes with stickers to add to an enchanting Christmas wonderland advent scene, that can be pulled out and displayed at home. PLUS, this bumper book includes a Letter to Santa activity, with a guaranteed personalised response. Fantastic added value and variety! A BRITISH COMPANY Orchard Toys have been making educational games and jigsaws in Britain for nearly 50 years. Our emphasis is on ‘learning made fun’, meaning parents can benefit from our trusted educational values whilst children will have so much fun they’ll want to play time and time again! We are proud of our British roots, and we still design all our products at our head office in Norfolk. With a reputation for quality and durability, we pride ourselves on creating products that can withstand the wear and tear of little hands, whether this is at home, in a childcare setting, or in schools. COMMITMENT TO QUALITY We are passionate about producing high-quality products with minimal impact on our environment. All our games and jigsaws are made from recycled board and paper from sustainable sources. Sturdy, wipe-clean game and puzzle boards mean our products will stand the test of time against wear and tear and messy hands, ensuring they can be passed down through generations. EXPLORE OUR RANGE Whether your child likes dinosaurs or vehicles, fairy tales, or farm life, Orchard Toys has an engaging learning toy to match. Our toys help children learn essential skills, such as counting and maths, phonics and spelling, colours and shapes, and telling time. By ensuring every product we make meets the perfect balance between education and fun, we continue to produce games, jigsaws and colouring books that get the seal of approval from both parents and children!
